heading: Thursday Night
text: Scattered showers; some wintry mix east, mainly over high terrain.
temperature: Upper 20s to mid 30s, except 35 to 40 broad valleys west

heading: Friday
text: Scattered afternoon showers; chance of early mix east.

heading: Saturday
temperature: Upper 40s to mid 50s north, upper 50s to mid 60s south

heading: Sunday
temperature: Upper 40s to mid 50s, some upper 50s in southern valleys
